keyFeatures.en: Create professional invoices in a single click

keyFeatures.zh: 吸引人且可定制的模板

description.en: Create and send unlimited invoices with no limitations on features or file size.
description.zh: 无限制创建和发送发票，无功能或文件大小限制

weaknesses.en: No advanced features for large businesses

positioning.en: Best for individuals and small businesses who need a simple and free solution for creating invoices.
positioning.zh: 最适合需要简单免费解决方案创建发票的个人和小型企业
